classAttribute.description: Which class attribute key to include in the object returned by style factories. Use 'className' for React, 'class' for Vue / Svelte / SolidJS, 'both' for universal components.

classTemplate.description: Template for generated CSS class names. Supports [name] (the @state-def identifier) and [hash:N] (first N characters of the SHA-256 hash of filePath + name) tokens.

generateDeclarations.description: When true, the plugin writes a .ecss.d.ts declaration file alongside each .ecss source file. Recommended for Svelte projects and any setup where the TypeScript Language Service Plugin is unavailable.
